blended.narrative: Mission Ridge is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light drizzle, highs of 45°F, winds around 25 mph.
Wednesday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 7" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 12".
